assertions.scriptName: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY rejects transaction block
assertions.query:
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY concurrent_index_tx_items_label_idx
						ON concurrent_index_tx_items (label);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY rejects transaction block
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)::TEXT
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_indexes
						WHERE schemaname = current_schema()
							AND tablename = 'concurrent_index_tx_items'
							AND indexname = 'concurrent_index_tx_items_label_idx';

assertions.scriptName: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY rejects transaction block
assertions.query: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY drop_concurrent_index_tx_items_label_idx;

assertions.scriptName: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY rejects transaction block
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)::TEXT
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_indexes
						WHERE schemaname = current_schema()
							AND tablename = 'drop_concurrent_index_tx_items'
							AND indexname = 'drop_concurrent_index_tx_items_label_idx';

assertions.scriptName: CLUSTER marks selected index as clustered
assertions.query:
SELECT c.relname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_index i
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class c ON c.oid = i.indexrelid
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class t ON t.oid = i.indrelid
						WHERE t.relname = 'cluster_metadata_items'
							AND i.indisclustered
						ORDER BY c.relname;

assertions.scriptName: partial unique index enforces predicate
assertions.query: INSERT INTO partial_unique_items VALUES (4, 10, true);

assertions.scriptName: partial unique index enforces predicate
partial unique index updates predicate membership
assertions.query: UPDATE partial_unique_update_items SET active = true WHERE id = 2;

assertions.scriptName: partial unique index updates predicate membership
ON CONFLICT infers partial unique index predicate
ON CONFLICT without predicate rejects partial unique index
assertions.query:
INSERT INTO partial_upsert_missing_predicate_items VALUES (1, 10, false)
						ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

assertions.scriptName: ON CONFLICT without predicate rejects partial unique index
assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partial_upsert_missing_predicate_items;

assertions.scriptName: unique expression index enforces computed values
assertions.query: INSERT INTO unique_expression_items VALUES (2, 'user@example.com');

assertions.scriptName: unique expression index enforces computed values
unique expression index enforces updated computed values
assertions.query: UPDATE unique_expression_update_items SET email = 'user@example.com' WHERE id = 2;

assertions.scriptName: unique expression index enforces updated computed values
ON CONFLICT infers unique expression index
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uses named unique constraint
unique index include columns do not affect uniqueness
assertions.query: INSERT INTO unique_include_items VALUES (2, 10, 'second');

assertions.scriptName: unique index include columns do not affect uniqueness
unique index NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects duplicate NULLs
assertions.query: INSERT INTO unique_nulls_not_distinct_items VALUES (2, NULL);

assertions.scriptName: unique index NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects duplicate NULLs
unique index NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects updated duplicate NULLs
assertions.query: UPDATE unique_nulls_not_distinct_update_items SET code = NULL WHERE id = 2;

assertions.scriptName: unique index NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects updated duplicate NULLs
ON CONFLICT uses NULLS NOT DISTINCT unique index
assertions.query:
INSERT INTO nulls_not_distinct_upsert_items VALUES (2, NULL, 'new')
						ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE
						SET label = EXCLUDED.label
						RETURNING id, code, label;

assertions.scriptName: ON CONFLICT uses NULLS NOT DISTINCT unique index
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects existing duplicate NULLs
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects existing duplicate NULLs
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)
						FROM pg_indexes
						WHERE tablename = 'create_nulls_not_distinct_existing_items'
							AND indexname = 'create_nulls_not_distinct_existing_code_idx';

assertions.scriptName: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX rejects existing duplicates
assertions.query:
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX create_unique_existing_duplicate_code_idx
						ON create_unique_existing_duplicate_items (code);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX rejects existing duplicates
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)
						FROM pg_indexes
						WHERE tablename = 'create_unique_existing_duplicate_items'
							AND indexname = 'create_unique_existing_duplicate_code_idx';

assertions.scriptName: index expression rejects set-returning functions
assertions.query:
CREATE INDEX index_srf_expression_items_idx
						ON index_srf_expression_items ((generate_series(1, 2)));

assertions.scriptName: index expression rejects volatile functions
assertions.query:
CREATE INDEX index_volatile_expression_items_idx
						ON index_volatile_expression_items ((random()));

assertions.scriptName: index expression rejects stable functions
assertions.query:
CREATE INDEX index_stable_expression_items_idx
						ON index_stable_expression_items ((now()));

assertions.scriptName: index expression rejects user-defined volatile functions
assertions.query:
CREATE INDEX index_udf_volatile_expression_items_idx
						ON index_udf_volatile_expression_items ((index_udf_volatile_value(v)));

assertions.scriptName: index expression rejects user-defined stable functions
assertions.query:
CREATE INDEX index_udf_stable_expression_items_idx
						ON index_udf_stable_expression_items ((index_udf_stable_value(v)));

assertions.scriptName: index expression rejects aggregate functions
assertions.query:
CREATE INDEX index_aggregate_expression_items_idx
						ON index_aggregate_expression_items ((avg(v)));

assertions.scriptName: partial index predicate rejects set-returning functions
partial index predicate rejects volatile functions
partial index predicate rejects stable functions
partial index predicate rejects user-defined volatile functions
partial index predicate rejects user-defined stable functions
partial index predicate rejects subqueries
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING handles unique expression index
